title: senecio pappii
intro: Senecio pappii, also known as Papp's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecio pappii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system health. Herbal preparations of Senecio pappii can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make a variety of health-promoting remedies.
